transcription.text: There the breakfast dishes are done Now children I have been stuck in this kitchen all morning, and I won't easy now mother remember the soup It's no trouble at all disappoint you I'll give you each a nice hot bowl of Campbell's vegetable soup and a sandwich go wash your hands This soup is delicious makes a good lunch all those good vegetables. I like the alphabet I like the wet part That's the broth Campbell makes it would be stock Billy Susie there you are forever having lunch with the neighbors Jane I hope it isn't too much trouble well to tell the truth Martha Remember the soup it's no trouble at all only takes four minutes to heat up some Campbell's They always eat better when you remember the soup reach for the Campbell's. It's right on your

segments.text: There the breakfast dishes are done
Now children I have been stuck in this kitchen all morning, and I won't easy now mother remember the soup
It's no trouble at all disappoint you
I'll give you each a nice hot bowl of Campbell's vegetable soup and a sandwich go wash your hands
This soup is delicious makes a good lunch all those good vegetables. I like the alphabet I like the wet part
That's the broth Campbell makes it would be stock Billy
Susie there you are forever having lunch with the neighbors
Jane I hope it isn't too much trouble well to tell the truth Martha
Remember the soup it's no trouble at all only takes four minutes to heat up some Campbell's
They always eat better when you remember the soup reach for the Campbell's. It's right on your
